comments: Reusable settings template for web development projects. Copy to .claude/settings.json and adapt for your project.

before_tool.command: npm run lint && npm run type-check
before_tool.description: Verify type-check passes before running bash commands (prevents broken code commit)
before_tool.reason: Enable manually when code changes require type safety before testing

after_tool.command: cd {{ cwd }} && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -20
after_tool.description: Auto lint after file edits to catch errors early
after_tool.reason: Disable if linter is slow; can enable for final polish phase

notes: This template enforces: (1) Single source of truth via constants.ts, (2) Type safety via tsc, (3) Code quality via linter, (4) Git discipline via hooks. Adapt allowed_prompts and permissions for your CI/CD pipeline.
